_comment: JIRA to local SVN workspace mapping example. Copy to svn-mapping.json and replace with real paths.
_howToConfigure: Each mapping represents one kind of issue landing in one local SVN workspace.
projectName: required. Prefer the exact JIRA project display name.
componentName: optional. When provided it is preferred over keyword-only matches.
keywords: optional. Used as a fallback match from title or description.
frontendPath/backendPath/rootPath: fill in your real SVN working copy paths. At least one must be non-empty.
verification: optional. Configure testCommand/buildCommand/smokeCommand so the workflow can run automated verification after code changes.
